reason: UI forbidden patterns — primary checklist for code review of mail surface (sensitive fields, status fallback, raw body).
Verify UNAVAILABLE / BODY_ONLY_SIZE_LIMIT / FULL three-branch render is explicit; no color-only signaling; unauthorized vs empty vs error separation.
Verify URL state correctness for filter/sort/page/since/until; no copying server state to global; no rawBody anywhere.
Verify no-any rule, runtime zod parse at MSW boundary, rawBodyStored z.literal(false) preserved in mirror.
Frontend mail contract mirror parity with backend src/modules/phishing-mail/contracts — checked field by field.
Confirm <StatusBadge>/<UnauthorizedState>/<EmptyState>/<ErrorState> reused, not duplicated; analysisMode literals not scattered.
Acceptance Criteria + R1–R10 used as the source of truth for trellis-check verdicts; raw-body grep self-check explicitly listed.
Tracker shared-constraint compliance — viewer route gating / URL state / sensitive display rules cross-checked.
Backend source-of-truth schema diffed against web mirror to catch drift, especially rawBodyStored: z.literal(false) preservation.
MailAnalysisQuery dimensions diffed against MSW handler implementation to ensure parity.
